meaning: n.独裁者,独裁政权执政者,口授令他人笔录者
examples: The quality of independence is so indispensable for us that parents had better act as a tutor, not a dictator.
Following the fall of the military dictator in March, the country has had a civilian government.
IT HAS been a rotten week for the dictator.
But when a dictator came to power in Somalia the relationship soured in the 1980s.
He recently unveiled a bust of the former Spanish dictator, Franco, in Marbella town hall.
